name: Short Strangle
description: Sell OTM call and OTM put to collect premium when IV is elevated and range-bound price action is expected.
hypothesis: Mean-reverting index with high implied volatility overstates realized move; selling 1 SD wings captures theta decay.

conditions: IV percentile above 50 on weekly expiry
Sell call at +1 SD strike, sell put at -1 SD strike
Enter 2-3 days before expiry for BankNifty weekly
entry_rules.position_sizing: Risk 1-2% of capital per trade; margin-adjusted lot size

exit_rules.stop_loss: 2x premium collected or breach of short strike
exit_rules.time_exit: Close by 1 PM on expiry day if not stopped

risk_params.max_loss_per_trade: Unlimited tail risk; cap via stop at 2x credit
risk_params.margin_required: SPAN + exposure margin per exchange rules

notes: Avoid RBI policy weeks and budget session unless hedged. Roll untested side if delta exceeds 0.35.
